settings.title: Craftsmanship
settings.desc: Every piece is handmade with care by master karigars. No shortcuts, no compromises — only the finest finishing that stands the test of time.

settings.title: Sustainability
settings.desc: We source fabrics ethically, support fair-trade practices, and ensure every artisan in our network earns a dignified livelihood.

settings.title: Authenticity
settings.desc: We source directly from artisan communities, preserving traditional techniques and ensuring every design is genuinely handcrafted in India.

settings.name: Meera Sharma
settings.bio: Visionary behind Vamas, passionate about preserving Indian textile heritage. Meera started the brand after a decade of working with karigars across Rajasthan and UP.

settings.name: Priya Nair
settings.bio: Brings 12 years of design expertise to every collection. Priya blends contemporary aesthetics with classical motifs, creating pieces that are timeless yet modern.

settings.name: Ramesh Kumar
settings.bio: Trained in traditional embroidery techniques from Varanasi, Ramesh leads our karigar network and ensures every piece meets Vamas' signature quality standard.

settings.description: Founded in Jaipur with just 10 designs and a single karigar workshop. The first collection sold out in 3 weeks.
Expanded to 200+ designs and launched our online store, bringing handcrafted blouses to customers across India.
Crossed 5,000 happy customers and partnered with artisan clusters in Varanasi, Lucknow, and Bhopal.
Featured in Vogue India’s “Brands Celebrating Indian Craft” spotlight. A proud moment for our entire karigar community.
10,000+ customers, 500+ designs, and shipping to 15+ states. The journey continues — one blouse at a time.

settings.hero_subtext: Born from a love of Indian craftsmanship, woven with tradition, worn with pride.
settings.story_p1: Founded with a deep love for Indian craftsmanship, Vamas was born from a simple belief — every woman deserves a blouse that tells her story. We work directly with skilled karigars across India to bring you heirloom-quality pieces at honest prices.
settings.story_p2: Our name, Vamas, is rooted in the Sanskrit tradition — it means “beautiful” and “belonging to the left side,” a sacred direction in Indian culture. Each stitch we make is a tribute to the artisans whose hands carry centuries of knowledge.
settings.story_p3: From the looms of Varanasi to the block-print studios of Jaipur, every Vamas blouse is a journey across India’s rich textile heritage.
settings.values_subtext: Three principles guide everything we create, from the studio to your wardrobe.
settings.team_subtext: Passionate individuals united by a love for Indian textiles and a mission to celebrate our artisans.
settings.timeline_subtext: From a small Jaipur studio to India’s trusted blouse brand — here is how we grew.
